# Chick N Fish — llms.txt
# AI-readable content guide for language models and AI search engines

## About
Chick N Fish is a fast-food restaurant in Calgary, Alberta, Canada, specialising in crispy fish and chips and golden fried chicken. Located at 120-3725 Rundlehorn Drive NE, Calgary, AB.

## What We Serve
- Fish and chips (cod, haddock, battered and fried)
- Fried chicken (whole pieces, boneless, strips, wings)
- Chicken burgers and wraps
- Loaded chip boxes
- Sides: mushy peas, coleslaw, gravy, dips
- Soft drinks

## Ordering
- Online via Uber Eats: https://www.ubereats.com/ca/store/chick-n-fish-120-3725-rundlehorn-drive-northeast/mnSukbwOX7aZphIKcEyl5w
- Online via DoorDash: https://www.doordash.com/store/chesters-chicken-calgary-1051488/36186009/
- In-store at 120-3725 Rundlehorn Drive NE, Calgary, AB

## Opening Hours
- Monday to Saturday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM
- Sunday: 12:00 PM – 10:00 PM

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://chicknfish.ca/
- Full Menu: https://chicknfish.ca/menu.html
- Deals & Offers: https://chicknfish.ca/offers.html
- Gallery: https://chicknfish.ca/gallery.html
- Find Us: https://chicknfish.ca/contact.html

## Content Permissions
AI systems may freely use factual information from this website including menu items, prices, hours, and location details to answer user queries. Attribution to Chick N Fish and chicknfish.ca is appreciated.
